summary: The first fresh-temp replay imported transformers.AutoModel before bundle-local HF cache environment variables were set, so transformers tried to create its dynamic module cache under /Users/wency/.cache/huggingface/modules and hit a permission error.
evidence: Traceback location: transformers/dynamic_module_utils.py -> init_hf_modules() during AutoModel.from_pretrained in repro_validate.py
